Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is a sequence diagram, while the ground truth is an architecture diagram. The generated diagram lacks the clear representation of components and their interactions as seen in the ground truth. It is not understandable to non-technical stakeholders due to its complexity and lack of visual clarity.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram does not include the same components or connections as the ground truth. Key elements like AWS services and their interactions are missing or represented differently, leading to an incomplete depiction of the architecture.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram uses a completely different style and notation (sequence diagram) compared to the ground truth (architecture diagram). There is no structural or semantic alignment between the two diagrams.
